# AI Business — aibusiness.vc

> The definitive guide to making money with AI. Real methods, honest income numbers, 356 tool reviews, startup funding data, and case studies. Every article connects AI to money.

## About

AI Business (aibusiness.vc) covers how individuals and businesses earn money using artificial intelligence. 146 articles across 8 sections, 356 AI tool reviews with pricing and ROI analysis, 36 LLM model profiles, 280 tool comparison pages, 18 profession-specific tool guides, and 28 tool category pages. Daily automated news from TechCrunch, Crunchbase, VentureBeat, and MIT Tech Review.

## Solo — Make Money with AI as an Individual (55 articles)
- [AI Automation Agency Guide](https://aibusiness.vc/solo/ai-automation-agency-guide): Start an AI automation agency ($10K-$100K/month)
- [HeadshotPro $300K/Month](https://aibusiness.vc/solo/headshot-pro-300k-month): Solo developer earning $300K/month with AI headshots
- [AI Consultant $34K/Month](https://aibusiness.vc/solo/ai-consultant-34k-month): 7 retainer clients, $34K monthly income
- [AI Freelancing Guide](https://aibusiness.vc/solo/ai-freelancing-complete-guide): From $0 to $10K/month
- [AI Blog Writer $12K/Month](https://aibusiness.vc/solo/ai-blog-writer-12k-month): 60-80 posts/month, $9K-12K income
- [Vibe Coding: Build Apps Over a Weekend](https://aibusiness.vc/solo/vibe-coding-build-sell-apps): $500-$20K/month building apps with AI
